name: Sweet Potatoes Baked in Oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the tops of the oranges and scrape out all the pulp with a spoon.
2. Wash the sweet potatoes and boil them in water until they are soft.
3. Drain the sweet potatoes, then peel them.
4. Mash the sweet potatoes well using a potato masher.
5. Add cream, butter, a small amount of grated orange peel, salt, a small amount of orange juice, and 2 tablespoons of sugar to the mashed sweet potatoes. Mix until fluffy.
6. Fill the prepared orange cups with the mixture.
7. Bake until lightly browned on top.
